objective: Plan a policy-filtered participant state export and two-independent-client conformance proof without host-database dependence.
falsifiable_claim: Two independently implemented clients can complete the hosted lifecycle and verify an export bundle that releases live claims and records every exclusion without trusting the host database.
exit_criteria: Two independent clients complete pairing, admission, claim, contribution, revoke-or-retire, and export.
The bundle verifies without hosted database trust, records exclusions, and releases all live claims.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M5_PORTABLE_EXIT_INDEPENDENT_CLIENTS_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Omit or mutate participant, claim, result, exclusion, release, predecessor, policy, and host-database fields; attempt export with live claims or foreign roots.
remaining_nonclaims: Portability covers permitted state only; it is not federation or payout.
No independent-sovereignty, acceptance, settlement, or stage closure claim.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
